/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=thread -g -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -current_version 0.15.3 -o ../../../../bin/libggml.0.15.3.dylib -install_name @rpath/libggml.0.dylib "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-dl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-reg.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,"/Volumes/Progetti Sviluppo/IA/Sovrano/build-tsan/bin" ../../../../bin/libggml-cpu.0.15.3.dylib ../../../../bin/libggml-blas.0.15.3.dylib ../../../../bin/libggml-base.0.15.3.dylib
